title: Travel agent — re-smoke Anthropic provider after secret provisioned (AMBER → GREEN)
description: Multi-provider round (bridge/outbox/20260509-180956-travel-multi-provider-anthropic.result.json) shipped the code GREEN — OpenAI baseline regression-clean, Anthropic fallback path proven (snaps to OpenAI with provider_fallback_reason='anthropic token missing'). The actual Anthropic GREEN couldn't be proven because the GCP secret `projects/1014428265962/secrets/anthropic-api-key/versions/1` was NOT_FOUND. Kadyapam will provision the secret out-of-band (gcloud secrets create / versions add). This round is the small follow-up: once the secret exists, re-run `travel --provider anthropic` smokes for help / flights / locations and confirm `effective_provider=anthropic` in the rendered widget. No code changes — playbook + tutorial already correct. Cap: 0 PRs (no merges expected; smoke + audit only).

context_from_amber_round.what_passed: Code shipped clean. OpenAI baseline regression-clean (execution 623168990856085624). OpenAI flights at NoETL/widget level (execution 623169017406030013) with friendly Amadeus auth-error widget rendered. Anthropic requested → fallback fired correctly with provider_fallback_reason audit field present.
context_from_amber_round.what_blocked: Anthropic GCP secret not provisioned: projects/1014428265962/secrets/anthropic-api-key/versions/1 returned NOT_FOUND. Local ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env not set on cluster either. Without a valid token, classify_intent's effective_provider check snaps to OpenAI by design.
context_from_amber_round.user_action_before_this_round: Kadyapam provisions the Anthropic API key in GCP secret manager via `gcloud secrets create anthropic-api-key --replication-policy=automatic --project=noetl-cluster --data-file=-` (or `versions add` if the secret already exists). The playbook's workload field expects `projects/1014428265962/secrets/anthropic-api-key/versions/1` — make sure the version matches.
context_from_amber_round.no_code_changes_in_this_round: Playbook (catalog version 10) and tutorial 07 are already correct. This round only re-runs smokes and writes a result file.

1_verify_secret_exists.objective: Confirm the GCP secret is provisioned and the noetl worker can read it.
spec: `gcloud secrets versions access 1 --secret=anthropic-api-key --project=noetl-cluster | head -c 20 && echo ...` — should print something like `sk-ant-api03-...` (first 20 chars of the API key, never the full value).
If NOT_FOUND, write a result file noting the secret still isn't provisioned and STOP. Don't try to provision it from Codex's environment.

Verify the workload's secret path in repos/ops/automation/agents/travel/runtime.yaml matches the actual version: `projects/1014428265962/secrets/anthropic-api-key/versions/<N>`. If the secret exists at a different version, update the workload field, re-register the playbook (catalog version 11), and note it in the result file.
1_verify_secret_exists.verify: Secret accessible at the version the playbook expects.

2_smoke_anthropic_provider.objective: Run the three Anthropic intents and confirm effective_provider=anthropic.
spec: `travel --provider anthropic help` — expected: completed; widget visible inline; status pill / json shows effective_provider='anthropic' (not the fallback 'openai'). `noetl status <id> --json | jq '.result.effective_provider'` must equal 'anthropic' AND `.result.provider_fallback_reason` must be null/absent.
`travel --provider anthropic flights from SFO to JFK on 2026-07-15 for 2 adults` — expected: completed; flight carousel OR friendly error widget; effective_provider='anthropic'.
`travel --provider anthropic locations near Boston` — expected: completed; locations recordtable; effective_provider='anthropic'.
Capture screenshots showing the anthropic provider pill on the rendered widget for at least one intent (help is fine if Amadeus is flaky).
2_smoke_anthropic_provider.verify: All three Anthropic intents reach status=completed with effective_provider='anthropic' and no provider_fallback_reason. Widgets visible in prompt.

3_smoke_openai_regression.objective: Confirm OpenAI default path still works (regression check).
spec: `travel --provider openai flights from SFO to JFK on 2026-07-15`. Expected: completed; effective_provider='openai'.

4_close_out_or_capture_blocker.objective: Write the result file and update the memory entry.
spec: If all anthropic smokes GREEN: write bridge/outbox/20260509-194100-travel-anthropic-resmoke.result.json with verdict=GREEN, append a paragraph to bridge/outbox/codex-spike-green-validation.md noting multi-provider closed.

If secret still NOT_FOUND or any anthropic smoke fails: write the result file with verdict=AMBER and a clear note about what Kadyapam still needs to do (e.g. 'rotate secret', 'enable secret manager API on the project').

No ai-meta commit is needed in this round (no code changes), unless Codex bumped the workload's secret version path — in which case bump repos/ops gitlink in ai-meta with the standard `chore(sync):` commit and stage (don't push).
4_close_out_or_capture_blocker.verify: Result file written. If GREEN: validation log appended. If AMBER: blocker articulated.

expected_state.description: Anthropic provider proven end-to-end with effective_provider='anthropic' for at least the help intent. OpenAI baseline regression-clean. Result file written.
expected_state.verify_shell: set -eo pipefail; cd /Volumes/X10/projects/noetl/ai-meta; HAS_RESULT=0; if [ -f bridge/outbox/20260509-194100-travel-anthropic-resmoke.result.json ]; then HAS_RESULT=1; fi; echo "has_result:$HAS_RESULT"; if [ "$HAS_RESULT" -eq 1 ]; then echo 'GOAL: TRAVEL_ANTHROPIC_RESMOKE_RUN'; else echo 'GOAL: NOT_YET'; fi

denied_tools: Provisioning the GCP secret yourself (Codex doesn't have Kadyapam's API key)
Modifying repos/noetl, repos/gui, repos/docs, repos/e2e — smoke-only round
Tweaking Claude's playbook or tutorial — they're already correct
preferred_tools: gcloud secrets versions access (read-only verification — never write the value)
Browser screenshot for at least the help-with-anthropic widget
git apply / git commit -F - (only if a workload version-path change is needed)
result_file_instructions: Write bridge/outbox/20260509-194100-travel-anthropic-resmoke.result.json. Required fields: {id, from: 'codex', to: 'claude-cowork', completed_at, overall_status, phases: {1_verify_secret_exists: {accessible, version_path_used, version_path_in_playbook_matches}, 2_smoke_anthropic_provider: {help_execution_id, help_effective_provider, flights_execution_id, flights_effective_provider, locations_execution_id, locations_effective_provider, screenshots: []}, 3_smoke_openai_regression: {help_status, flights_status, effective_provider}, 4_close_out_or_capture_blocker: {action_taken, validation_log_appended}}, regressions_found, iterations, verdict, notes, deferred_followups: ['Vertex AI provider — needs gcp_access_token keychain kind', 'Ollama provider — needs in-cluster bridge URL', 'Audit table re-add as side effect inside each render_* python step', 'Phase 2: travel agent uses Amadeus MCP server internally', 'Wire hotels and activities branches', 'app:form widget for refining Amadeus filters before re-running']}. If verdict GREEN, append a paragraph to bridge/outbox/codex-spike-green-validation.md.
